messages.text: The marrow-glutton splits open a lipless maw ringed with grinding plates and takes a wet, tearing bite of you, greedy for the marrow beneath. The blow {verb} you!
The marrow-glutton heaves its bulk at you, maw gaping, and you scramble aside as its jaws clash on empty rot.
The marrow-glutton clamps down and grinds, its plates working to crack you open for the marrow, and the garden trembles at its feeding! The blow {verb} you!
